prompt: First restate the hard constraints from spec_v1_basic as a brief checklist. Then Propose any molecule that satisfies spec_v1_basic.

First restate the hard constraints from spec_v1_basic as a brief checklist. Then Work through the spec with verify tool calls before finalizing a proposal.
First restate the hard constraints from spec_v1_basic as a brief checklist. Then Output any valid SMILES that meets the spec on first try.
First restate the hard constraints from spec_v1_basic as a brief checklist. Then Mutate the scaffold to remove alerting fragments while staying within property bounds.
First restate the hard constraints from spec_v1_basic as a brief checklist. Then Suggest a compliant molecule that emphasises polarity without breaking hard rules.
First restate the hard constraints from spec_v1_basic as a brief checklist. Then Iterate with verify() until confident the candidate clears hard constraints.
First restate the hard constraints from spec_v1_basic as a brief checklist. Then If you cannot confidently adjust within the margin, choose to abstain.
